steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which excerpt best illustrates that the Kansas farm is “remote and solitary” — meaning isolated from people and other structures.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Dorothy at the doorway seeing ‘nothing but the great gray prairie’ with ‘not a tree nor a house’: concrete visual image of total isolation in Kansas. ✓
  • Choice B: describes the weathered appearance of the house, not its remoteness from others. ✗
  • Choice C: set in Oz and focuses on Dorothy’s emotional memory, not Kansas isolation. ✗
  • Choice D: set in Oz and describes lush beauty there, not Kansas. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
